understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the selectable piece(s) on a 3-pixels-per-cell grid to reach the goal tiles (marked +), using the limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. If a pushable block is immediately adjacent in that direction, the move can push it along (assuming the space beyond is not blocked). Walls (#) and other boundaries can prevent or alter movement, and the movement_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency rather than guaranteed failure. When multiple selectable pieces exist, CLICK with an exact pixel-coordinate target switches control to the selectable at that position.
